glosses.ja: 見積もる; 評価する

sentences.target: Wir müssen die Zeit grob schätzen.

translations.de: Wir müssen die Zeit grob schätzen.
translations.en: We need to roughly estimate the time.
translations.es: Tenemos que calcular el tiempo a ojo.
translations.fr: Il faut estimer le temps à peu près.
translations.it: Dobbiamo stimare il tempo a occhio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得大致估算一下时间。
translations.pt: Precisamos estimar o tempo por alto.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים להעריך את הזמן בערך.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cần ước chừng thời gian.
translations.ar: نحتاج إلى تقدير الوقت بشكل تقريبي.
translations.nl: We moeten de tijd ongeveer inschatten.
translations.hu: Nagyjából meg kell becsülnünk az időt.
translations.hi: हमें समय का मोटा अंदाज़ा लगाना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να υπολογίσουμε περίπου τον χρόνο.
translations.nb: Vi må anslå tiden sånn omtrent.
translations.id: Kita perlu memperkirakan waktunya secara kasar.
translations.sv: Vi behöver uppskatta tiden på ett ungefär.
translations.fi: Meidän täytyy arvioida aika suurin piirtein.
translations.ja: 時間をだいたい見積もる必要がある。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1pl) selecting an infinitive complement ('schätzen').
Definite article (accusative singular, feminine) introducing the direct object 'Zeit'.
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'schätzen' in the sense of estimating.
Degree adverb modifying the verb; indicates approximation.
Infinitive lexical verb selected by the modal 'müssen'; here means 'to estimate'.

sentences.target: Ich weiß deine Hilfe zu schätzen.

translations.de: Ich weiß deine Hilfe zu schätzen.
translations.vi: Tôi trân trọng sự giúp đỡ của bạn.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हारी मदद की सराहना करता हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg setter pris på hjelpen din.
translations.da: Jeg sætter pris på din hjælp.
translations.ja: あなたの助けに感謝しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (present, 1sg) forming the idiomatic construction 'etw. zu schätzen wissen' ('to appreciate').
Possessive determiner (accusative singular, feminine) modifying 'Hilfe'.
Common noun (feminine); semantic object of the infinitive 'schätzen' within the idiom.
Infinitival marker introducing the non-finite verb 'schätzen' in the 'zu-Infinitiv' construction.
Infinitive verb; here in the idiomatic sense 'to value/appreciate' (as part of 'zu schätzen wissen').

sentences.target: Ich kann sein Alter nicht schätzen.

translations.de: Ich kann sein Alter nicht schätzen.
translations.fr: Je n'arrive pas à estimer son âge.
translations.it: Non riesco a stimare la sua età.
translations.ko: 그 사람 나이를 가늠할 수가 없어요.
translations.ru: Я не могу прикинуть его возраст.
translations.pt: Não consigo estimar a idade dele.
translations.he: אני לא מצליח להעריך את הגיל שלו.
translations.vi: Tôi không đoán được tuổi của người đó.
translations.nl: Ik kan zijn leeftijd niet inschatten.
translations.uk: Я не можу прикинути його вік.
translations.hi: मैं उसकी उम्र का अंदाज़ा नहीं लगा सकता।
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να εκτιμήσω την ηλικία του.
translations.nb: Jeg klarer ikke å anslå alderen hans.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte uppskatta hans ålder.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke vurdere hans alder.
translations.ja: 彼の年齢が見当もつかない。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg) selecting a bare infinitive ('schätzen').
Possessive determiner (accusative singular) modifying 'Alter'; refers to a male possessor.
Common noun (neuter); direct object of 'schätzen' meaning 'age'.
Negation particle; scopes over the VP headed by the infinitive 'schätzen'.
Bare infinitive complement of the modal 'kann'; here in the sense 'to estimate'.

sentences.target: Meine Chefin lernt, das Team zu schätzen.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃeːfɪn lɛʁnt das tiːm t͡suː ˈʃɛt͡sən/

translations.de: Meine Chefin lernt, das Team zu schätzen.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃeːfɪn lɛʁnt das tiːm t͡suː ˈʃɛt͡sən/
translations.en: My boss is learning to appreciate the team.
translations.es: Mi jefa está aprendiendo a valorar al equipo.
translations.fr: Ma patronne apprend à apprécier l'équipe.
translations.it: La mia responsabile sta imparando ad apprezzare il team.
translations.ko: 우리 상사는 팀을 점점 인정하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的老板正在学会欣赏团队。
translations.yue: 我嘅上司學緊欣賞個團隊。
translations.pt: Minha chefe está aprendendo a valorizar a equipe.
translations.he: המנהלת שלי לומדת להעריך את הצוות.
translations.vi: Sếp của tôi đang học cách trân trọng đội ngũ.
translations.nl: Mijn leidinggevende leert het team waarderen.
translations.hu: A főnöknőm megtanulja értékelni a csapatot.
translations.hi: मेरी बॉस टीम की कद्र करना सीख रही हैं।
translations.pl: Moja szefowa uczy się doceniać zespół.
translations.el: Η προϊσταμένη μου μαθαίνει να εκτιμά την ομάδα.
translations.nb: Sjefen min lærer å verdsette teamet.
translations.id: Atasan saya sedang belajar menghargai tim.
translations.sv: Min chef lär sig att uppskatta teamet.
translations.ro: Șefa mea învață să aprecieze echipa.
translations.cs: Moje šéfová se učí oceňovat tým.
translations.da: Min chef lærer at værdsætte teamet.
translations.ja: 私の上司はチームを大切にすることを学んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (nominative singular, feminine) modifying 'Chefin'.
Common noun (feminine); subject of 'lernt'.
Finite main verb (present, 3sg) taking a 'zu-Infinitiv' complement.
Definite article (accusative singular, neuter) introducing the object 'Team' of the infinitive.
Common noun (neuter); object of the infinitive 'schätzen'.
Infinitival marker introducing 'schätzen' as a non-finite complement to 'lernt'.
Infinitive verb; here means 'to appreciate/value' the object 'das Team'.

Ich weiß deine Hilfe zu schätzen.
Ich kann sein Alter nicht schätzen.
Meine Chefin lernt, das Team zu schätzen.

My boss is learning to appreciate the team.
